title: Guild of Vindicators
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:ClatTheShamer2.png|right|200px]]
The '''Guild of Vindicators''' was a cult of religious fanatics that was known to operate in the region of space containing [[Cheelit/Legends|Cheelit]], whose ruler [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Dhol]] referred to them derisively as "those stealers-of-eggs". Their symbol was a small skull clasp worn at the throat of a rough brown cassock. They were known to have had an [[Eye/Legends|eye]]-for-an-eye belief in which [[Death/Legends|death]] was the only way to expiate one's sins. Their intolerance of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] atrocities and use of [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] like [[Clat]] the Shamer led them into direct conflict with the Empire, and they forced Dhol to take part in an [[Mission to Cheelit|attempt]] to assassinate [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to punish him for his myriad misdeeds.
